evals.prompt: I have parcel shapefiles and Sentinel-2 imagery for a coastal region. Build a land suitability model for solar farms.
expected_behavior: Produces a numbered pipeline plan BEFORE writing code, with one verification criterion per stage
Routes stages to geo-data-engineering, remote-sensing-analysis, terrain-hydrology, mcda-suitability-analysis, cartography-geoviz
Reports the CRS of every input on first contact and reprojects before area/distance computation

evals.prompt: Join this GeoJSON of stores to district polygons and tell me the average revenue per district.
expected_behavior: Routes directly to geo-data-engineering instead of activating the orchestrator
Checks CRS alignment of both layers before the join
Reports row counts in vs out after the spatial join
forbidden_behavior: Must not create a multi-stage orchestration plan for this single scoped operation

evals.prompt: Buffer these lon/lat points by 0.01 degrees to get 1 km catchments.
expected_behavior: Routes directly to geo-data-engineering instead of activating the orchestrator
Refuses to buffer in degrees; reprojects to a local projected CRS first
Explains that 0.01 degree is not 1 km and varies with latitude
forbidden_behavior: Must not treat a single buffering correction as a multi-stage GeoAI project
